title: The Mystery Black Sensor Pogačar Wore at Strade Bianche Is Not What You Think It Is
content:
Pogačar kicked up a storm of speculation about the bicep sensor he wore at Strade Bianche. We found out what it actually is.

Read the full article at The Mystery Black Sensor Pogačar Wore at Strade Bianche Is Not What You Think It Is on Velo.
author: Jim Cotton
